executives.name: Deborah Friedman
executives.background: Ms. Friedman is a retired partner of Davis Graham & Stubbs LLP, where she practiced law for over 30 years, specializing in corporate finance and securities law with a focus on the mining industry.

executives.name: Randy Eppler
executives.background: Mr. Eppler is a Managing Director at Milestone Capital Advisors. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining and finance industries, including senior roles at Newmont Mining Corporation.
